problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of CRISPR. CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
